title: Add Go backend kanban API: types, handler, route
description: Add KanbanCard/KanbanStage types to api/types.go, add handlers/kanban.go with KanbanHandler, register /api/kanban in server.go

title: Update UI kanban action to call /api/kanban endpoint
description: Replace getAgents() derivation in ui/src/app/actions/kanban.ts with direct call to /kanban backend endpoint

title: Add modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk dependency to go/go.mod
description: Run go get github.com/modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk in go/ directory

title: Create go/pkg/client/kanban.go with Kanban HTTP client
description: Add KanbanClient that calls /api/kanban endpoint, following existing client patterns

title: Create go/cmd/kanban-mcp/main.go - MCP server with list_kanban_cards tool
description: MCP server using modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk, calls kagent HTTP API, supports stdio+HTTP transport
